messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required before doing anything else.





Now loading the report-analyzer skill:



Now I will analyze the document at `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584209391522705456Document_2.pdf` using the BloomCell clinical framework and produce the required 8 structured records.

Based on the BloomCell report-analyzer skill applied to the uploaded lab report (Document_2.pdf), here is the analyzed output. I will now merge each of the 8 skill objects with the original payload and store each one in Cosmos DB.



**Storing Record 1 of 8 — Internal Notes (highlight):**

**Storing Record 2 of 8 — Internal Notes (note):****Storing Record 3 of 8 — Understanding Your Results (highlight):****Storing Record 4 of 8 — Understanding Your Results (note):****Storing Record 5 of 8 — Priority Actions - Next 30 Days (highlight):****Storing Record 6 of 8 — Priority Actions - Next 30 Days (note):****Storing Record 7 of 8 — Long-Term Strategy (highlight):****Storing Record 8 of 8 — Long-Term Strategy (note):**

8 records saved successfully.
